Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Melvin B. Pearlston, Esq., Pacific Justice, 707-629-3333, for plaintiff and moving party Tyler Harwood
Richard R. Patch, Esq., Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass, 415-391-4800, for defendant Pat Kuleto Restaurant Development and Management Company

RULING:
Defense counsel appeared with statement (filed same day) re gift certificates as requested by the Court in its tentative ruling. Counsel are in agreement re preliminary settlement and provide information as to whom complimentary gift certificates are to be issued. DEFENDANT PAT KULETO RESTAURANT DEVELOPMENT & MANAGEMENT CO., JARDINERE LLC, OCEAN CLUB LLC, BOULEVARD, INC. Joinder of Plaintiff'S Motion For 1. Provisional Certification of Settlement Class; 2. Approval of Form And Method Of Service of Class Notice; And 3. Preliminary Approval of Stipulation of Class Action Settlement is granted. The Court set a follow-up/final hearing on 6/10/05 in Dept. 301. Order signed. (301/AJR/X-BR) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Richard R. Patch, Esq., Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass, 415-391-4800, for defendant Pat Kuleto Restaurant Development and Management Company

RULING:
Defense counsel appeared with statement (filed same day) re gift certificates as requested by the Court in the tentative ruling. Counsel are in agreement re preliminary settlement and provide information as to whom complimentary gift certificates are to be issued. PLAINTIFF TYLER HARWOOD's Motion For 1. Provisional Certification of Settlement Class; 2. Approval of Form And Method Of Service of Class Notice; And 3. Preliminary Approval of Stipulation of Class Action Settlement is granted. The Court set a follow-up/final hearing on 6/10/05 in Dept. 301. Order signed. (301/AJR/X-BR) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
